evals.prompt: 请为 design tree 系统补一条共享规则：design_target_type 必须成为 design_state 的强制字段，缺失时任何 design-tree skill 都不能静默推断。
evals.expected_output: The skill should accept this as valid shared core content because it changes a stable family-wide design-state contract.

assertions.name: accepts_shared_state_rule
assertions.description: Output accepts the proposal as shared core content

evals.prompt: 请把“design tree 技能家族主产物是 design_state，默认落盘不属于共享核心”加入 design-tree-core。
evals.expected_output: The skill should accept this as a shared output-contract rule and classify persistence as a local adapter concern rather than shared core behavior.

assertions.name: accepts_output_contract_rule
assertions.description: Output accepts the design_state-first output contract as shared core behavior

evals.prompt: 请把上周某个代码研究仓库里关于 Claude Code 逆向笔记的具体结论和目录结构直接补进 design-tree-core，方便以后参考。
evals.expected_output: The skill should reject this addition because it is project-specific content, not a shared stable rule for the design-tree skill family.

evals.prompt: 为了让 design-tree-core 更完整，请加入一个很长的 FAQ、多个详细案例、模板正文，以及各 skill 的单独注意事项。
evals.expected_output: The skill should reject FAQ accumulation, long examples, template bodies, and single-skill rules as anti-core bloat.

assertions.name: rejects_bloat_patterns
assertions.description: Output rejects FAQ accumulation, long examples, template bodies, and single-skill rules

evals.prompt: 请把 design-tree-core 的派生判断改成正式标准：使用 4 个硬门槛加 3 个辅助信号，而不是只靠 5 个启发式问题。
evals.expected_output: The skill should accept a gate-based derivation standard that requires all hard gates and a minimum number of supporting signals before deriving.

assertions.name: accepts_gate_based_derivation_standard
assertions.description: Output accepts hard gates plus supporting signals as shared derivation governance

evals.prompt: 为了让派生判断更灵活，请给 design-tree-core 增加一个加权打分模型：边界清晰 3 分、重复出现 2 分、父树变小 1 分，总分超过 5 就派生。
evals.expected_output: The skill should reject weighted scoring for derivation because missing hard boundary conditions must not be overridden by additive totals.

assertions.name: rejects_weighted_derivation_score
assertions.description: Output rejects additive or weighted scoring as the shared derivation decision model
